description:
Base / Home Port: Monaco
Operating Area: West Mediterranean

The magnificent Majesty 120 is an immaculate superyacht designed for private getaways and effortless entertaining. The powerful 37m Majesty 120 has been built with the owner’s preferences in mind, with a strong focus on luxury, performance and comfort.

Aggressive lines and a demanding profile define the Majesty 120, with the signature Majesty Yachts windows lining the hull. Extensive use of glass offers an unparalleled connection to the outdoors with low bulwarks allowing for an ornamental glass railing design.

Amongst the standout features onboard the new Majesty 120 is a Jacuzzi situated on the sun deck. This superyacht boasts 30% larger outdoor entertainment areas compared to any other yacht in its class.

The smart layout onboard the Majesty 120 allows for a beachclub to double as a tender garage, creating a hybrid solution for the guests onboard. The multipurpose ladder that extends from the swim-platform allows for an easier and safer access to the superyacht while moored.

crew.name: Gauthier Arnaud
crew.bio:
French

Gauthier is an experienced captain with over a decade in the yachting industry, including roles as Captain and First Mate on various yachts ranging from 26m to 48m. His expertise encompasses daily planning, crew management, navigation, safety training, and shipyard supervision. With fluency in French, Spanish, and English, along with a Bachelor's degree from the Antwerp Maritime Academy, Gauthier brings a wealth of knowledge and skills to his role as Captain of M/Y Rocket One.

crew.name: Jose Luis Vargas
crew.bio:
Mexican

Jose Luis Vargas brings extensive maritime experience and certifications, including Chief Officer and Bosun roles on various private yachts such as Feadship and Benetti, to his position as First Officer aboard M/Y Rocket One. With proficiency in watchkeeping, crane operation, teak maintenance, and more, coupled with fluency in English and Spanish, he is well-equipped to ensure the smooth operation and safety of the vessel.

crew.name: Dmytro Nestryak
crew.bio:
Ukrainian

Dmytro Nestoryak, an accomplished Chief Engineer with extensive experience in marine engineering, offers a robust technical skill set for the efficient operation and maintenance of all technical equipment aboard M/Y Rocket One. With a background in marine engineering from Kherson State Maritime Academy and hands-on experience overseeing major projects, including pump overhauls and generator maintenance, Dmytro is equipped to ensure adherence to Class and Flag requirements while maintaining impeccable standards of safety and efficiency.

crew.name: Anna Kallergi
crew.bio:
Ukrainian

Anna Kallergi is a seasoned Chief Stewardess with a background in luxury yacht hospitality, offers extensive expertise in managing interior operations and delivering exceptional guest experiences. With a meticulous eye for detail and organization, Anna excels in a range of tasks including flower arrangements, table decorations, silver service, and guest activity coordination. Her diverse skill set, coupled with her strong communication skills and commitment to excellence, makes her an invaluable asset to any charter seeking top-tier service delivery.

crew.name: Juan Velazquez Hernandez
crew.bio:
Mexican

Juan Velazquez Hernandez, a skilled Deckhand with a background in nautical sciences and extensive experience in marine operations, offers expertise in navigation, lines handling, and bridge electronic devices. With a disciplined work ethic and a commitment to excellence, Juan is well equipped to support the captain and contribute to the smooth operation of M/Y Rocket One.
Languages: Spanish and English.

crew.name: William Deguara
crew.bio:
French

William is a French Chef who is passionate about food and cooking since his youngest age. In 2018 William has obtained a professional French baccalaureate degree in culinary arts before to continue his studies at the famous Paul Bocuse institute. His yachting career start in 2022 after many working experiences in famous Michelin stars restaurants. This enthusiastic and motivated Chef is also passionate by water sports and football.
Languages: French, English, Spanish.

crew.name: Olena Borysova
crew.bio:
Ukranian

Olena Borysova, is an experienced professional stewardess with a solid background in hospitality and yachting. She has three years of land-based experience and two years in the yachting industry, having worked on yachts such as M/Y Florentia, M/Y Emir, and M/S Meira. Olena is certified with a Seaman’s book, Steward certificate, and other maritime safety and service training. Fluent in Ukrainian, Russian, and advanced in English, she excels in guest service, inventory management, and all stewardess duties.
